case_title: DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF VS. SOUTH BAY CONSTRUCTORS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GEORGE STEIN IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION #416

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION #416 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SOUTH BAY CONSTRUCTORS $11,064.93 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $417.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,482.23, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT-NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. PAUL H. ALVARADO. REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220.
